recommendations.title: Possum
recommendations.overview: A disgraced children's puppeteer returns to his childhood home and is forced to confront his wicked stepfather and the secrets that have tortured him his entire life.

recommendations.title: Bruce Lee, the Legend
recommendations.overview: The Official Golden Harvest tribute to the Master of the Martial Arts Film, Bruce Lee.

recommendations.title: Love Aaj Kal
recommendations.overview: Two lovers break up after they realize that their career goals are pulling them in different directions.

recommendations.title: Everything's Gonna Be Great
recommendations.overview: When Altan swipes prescription drugs from his brother Nuri's pharmacy, they soon find themselves on a dangerous but funny road trip to get rid of the stuff and escape the mafiosi Altan tried to double-cross. Along the way, the brother who are compete

recommendations.title: Blinded by the Light
recommendations.overview: In 1987, during the austere days of Thatcher’s Britain, a teenager learns to live life, understand his family, and find his own voice through the music of Bruce Springsteen.

recommendations.title: The Other Zoey
recommendations.overview: Highly intelligent computer major Zoey Miller is uninterested in romantic love, but her life is turned upside down when Zack, the school's soccer star, gets amnesia and mistakes Zoey for his girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Cuban Fury
recommendations.overview: Beneath Bruce Garrett's under-confident, overweight exterior, the passionate heart of a salsa king lies dormant. Now, one woman is about to reignite his Latin fire.
